commands.review_summary:
The PR snapshots the managed npm plugin root before npm-backed install/update mutation and restores package.json, package-lock.json, and node_modules on rejected candidates, with npm rollback regressions and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection rather than a live run: current main mutates the managed npm root before validation and rolls back by uninstall/removal instead of restoring prior metadata and hoisted dependencies. The PR adds a focused blocked-update regression that exercises the same failure mode.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed because the open PR already contains the focused implementation, regression tests, changelog, and green PR checks; the remaining action is normal maintainer review and merge.

target.title: Preserve npm plugin root when install validation blocks update
